**Post-merge cleanup detected** — you're on a stale branch:

- Current branch `feature/issue-452-cleanup-detector-worktrees` — remote branch merged/deleted

To clean up, run:
```powershell
# Run in a PowerShell (pwsh) terminal:
pwsh 'C:/agent-orchestra/skills/session-startup/scripts/post-merge-cleanup.ps1' -IssueNumber 452 -FeatureBranch 'feature/issue-452-cleanup-detector-worktrees'
```
